languages.text: {n}Лицо гемункула не выражает ничего, кроме презрительного высокомерия.{/n} "У тебя есть лишь пара мгновений моего драгоценного времени, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}мон-кай{/g}. Говори".

traits.locale_text: {n}Лицо гемункула не выражает ничего, кроме презрительного высокомерия. Взгляд его неотрывно прикован к вам.{/n} "У тебя есть ровно две минуты моего внимания, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}мон-кай{/g}".
traits.speaker: Haemonculus

languages.text: {n}The Haemonculus's face betrays nothing but contemptuous arrogance.{/n} "You have but a few moments of my precious time, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Speak."

languages.text: {n}Du kannst aus dem Gesicht des Haemonculus nichts als spöttische Arroganz ablesen.{/n} "Ihr habt nur einige Momente meiner wertvollen Zeit, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Chem-Pan-Sey{/g}. Sprecht."
languages.original_text: {n}The Haemonculus's face betrays nothing but contemptuous arrogance.{/n} "You have but a few moments of my precious time, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Speak."

traits.locale_text: {n}Du kannst aus dem Gesicht des Haemonculus nichts als spöttische Arroganz ablesen.{/n} "Ihr habt nur einige Momente meiner wertvollen Zeit, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Chem-Pan-Sey{/g}. Sprecht."

languages.text: {n}Le visage de l'hémoncule ne trahit aucune émotion, hormis de l'arrogance.{/n} « Je n'ai guère que quelques instants à vous accorder, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Parlez. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Haemonculus's face betrays nothing but contemptuous arrogance.{/n} "You have but a few moments of my precious time, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Speak."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le visage de l'hémoncule ne trahit aucune émotion, hormis de l'arrogance.{/n} « Je n'ai guère que quelques instants à vous accorder, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Parlez. »

languages.text: {n}El rostro del Hemónculo solo muestra arrogancia y desdén.{/n} «Te dedicaré unos momentos de mi atención, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Habla».
languages.original_text: {n}The Haemonculus's face betrays nothing but contemptuous arrogance.{/n} "You have but a few moments of my precious time, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Speak."

traits.locale_text: {n}El rostro del Hemónculo solo muestra arrogancia y desdén.{/n} «Te dedicaré unos momentos de mi atención, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Habla».

languages.text: {n}Haimonkulus'un yüzünde aşağılayıcı bir kibir ifadesi görüyorsun.{/n} "Değerli vaktimin en fazla birkaç saniyesini alabilirsin {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Konuş."
languages.original_text: {n}The Haemonculus's face betrays nothing but contemptuous arrogance.{/n} "You have but a few moments of my precious time, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Speak."

traits.locale_text: {n}Haimonkulus'un yüzünde aşağılayıcı bir kibir ifadesi görüyorsun.{/n} "Değerli vaktimin en fazla birkaç saniyesini alabilirsin {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Konuş."

languages.text: {n}血伶人的脸上只有轻蔑与傲慢。{/n}“我的时间很宝贵，你只有资格占用片刻，{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}猴子{/g}。有话快说。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Haemonculus's face betrays nothing but contemptuous arrogance.{/n} "You have but a few moments of my precious time, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Speak."

traits.locale_text: {n}血伶人的脸上只有轻蔑与傲慢。{/n}“我的时间很宝贵，你只有资格占用片刻，{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}猴子{/g}。有话快说。”

languages.text: {n}ハエモンクルスの顔には、侮蔑に満ちた傲慢さよりほかに、何も表れていない。{/n}「私の貴重な時間を、貴様にくれてやるのはほんのわずかだ、{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}モンケイ{/g}。話せ」
languages.original_text: {n}The Haemonculus's face betrays nothing but contemptuous arrogance.{/n} "You have but a few moments of my precious time, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Speak."

traits.locale_text: {n}ハエモンクルスの顔には、侮蔑に満ちた傲慢さよりほかに、何も表れていない。{/n}「私の貴重な時間を、貴様にくれてやるのはほんのわずかだ、{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}モンケイ{/g}。話せ」
